data.title: CI: test_worktree_sync_script_removed fails — worktree-sync-from-main.sh not yet removed
data.description: Pre-existing CI failure on main. test-merge-no-sync-lib.sh::test_worktree_sync_script_removed expects plugins/dso/scripts/worktree-sync-from-main.sh to be removed as part of v2 cleanup, but the script still exists. Either the script should be removed or the test should be updated.
